chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-409 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.24579/2023 (Urgent). 2. For order on CMA No.1675/2023 (Exemption). 3. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 6th November 2023 None present. -*-*-*-*-*- Petitioner and his counsel are called absent, no intimation is received. Record reflects that on 20.01.2023 and 27.02.2023 counsel for the petitioner requested for time to prepare the case and the matter was adjourned. On 16.09.2023, neither the petitioner nor his counsel was in attendance and the urgent application was dismissed, whereas, the matter was adjourned. Today, no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner inspite of filing urgent application, which leads to conclude that the petitioner has chosen to remain absent without any intimation. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed on account of non- prosecution alongwith listed applications. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E *Farhan/PS*
